name: Bidease
description: Mobile programmatic DSP for app user acquisition and retargeting with proprietary ML bidding and SKAN support.

seo.title: Bidease — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: Bidease: Mobile programmatic DSP for app user acquisition and retargeting with proprietary ML bidding and SKAN support.

when_to_use: SKAdNetwork-compatible programmatic UA for iOS post-ATT campaigns
Retargeting lapsed users on Android via proprietary ML DSP
Scale CPI installs with privacy-preserving attribution on iOS 17+
Programmatic video and playable ad delivery for mobile game UA

pros: ML models built specifically for mobile apps
cons: Smaller scale than Moloco or Liftoff
Creative production is mostly on advertiser
review.verdict: Credible mid-tier DSP with transparency advantage, but can't match Moloco-scale spend efficiency.
review.best_for: Mobile apps wanting programmatic UA without the black-box feel of larger DSPs.
review.not_for: Brands that need full creative services or massive sub-second bidding scale.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence

lock_in.reason: DSP managed service, hard to migrate campaigns
